hypothesis: Combining OBV and Volume Oscillator to detect hidden liquidity movements can anticipate trend reversals before EMA signals change, leveraging the fact that large institutional flows often precede price action shifts. This approach filters for strong volume confirmation and avoids false breakouts during low-liquidity periods.

Combining EMA trend confirmation with OBV and Volume Oscillator detects hidden liquidity flows that precede momentum shifts, allowing early entry before EMA signals change direction, while ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to volatility.
